evidence: packages/btd/src/ledger-anchor.ts defines AssetPackLedgerAnchor with chain, network, commitment method, txid/hash, roots, access policy hash, BTD range, finality, and confirmations
protocol-demonstration/src/receipt-schemas.js requires commitmentMethod, roots, policy hash, range, finality, and confirmations for btd_asset_pack_ledger_anchor
supabase/migrations/002_v27_btd_crypto_registry.sql persists btd_asset_pack_ledger_anchors

closureCriteria.criterion: at least one concrete Bitcoin ledger anchor path is implemented in local and signet form
evidence: packages/btd/src/ledger-anchor.ts supports Bitcoin networks including regtest, signet, testnet, and mainnet
package and API tests exercise signet AssetPack anchor preparation, broadcast, and observed confirmation
protocol-demonstration/test/v27-crypto-primitives.test.js proves the demonstration anchor uses the public signet proof lane

closureCriteria.criterion: Taproot, OP_RETURN, or another standard Bitcoin commitment method is selected by implementation proof
evidence: packages/btd/src/ledger-anchor.ts defaults Bitcoin anchors to commitmentMethod: taproot
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts asserts Taproot selection
protocol-demonstration/src/v27-crypto-primitives.js emits commitmentMethod: taproot for the minimal witness

closureCriteria.criterion: Ethereum registry/event anchoring is secondary or optional and either implemented or explicitly bounded as not ready
evidence: packages/btd/src/ledger-anchor.ts supports Ethereum only when commitmentMethod is explicitly supplied
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts proves ethereum_registry_event anchors and rejects implicit Ethereum anchors
Gate 11 does not claim value-bearing Ethereum deployment readiness

closureCriteria.criterion: anchors bind AssetPack id, BTD range, source manifest root, proof root, and access policy hash
evidence: buildPreparedAssetPackLedgerAnchor requires assetPackId, commitmentRoot, sourceManifestRoot, proofRoot, accessPolicyHash, and non-empty BTD range
/api/btd/asset-pack-ledger-anchor returns the same binding through the commercial route boundary
btd_asset_pack_ledger_anchors enforces non-empty range, cap bounds, non-empty policy hash, and persisted root fields

closureCriteria.criterion: pending, confirmed, reorged, and failed states replay
evidence: packages/btd/src/ledger-anchor.ts models prepared, broadcast, confirmed, reorged, and failed states
advanceAssetPackLedgerAnchor rejects invalid transitions and requires confirmations for confirmed state
package/API tests cover broadcast and confirmed observation; the state machine admits reorged and failed transitions without claiming finality

closureCriteria.criterion: commercial API route is unversioned and commit-gated
evidence: packages/api/src/routes/btd-crypto.ts exposes /btd/asset-pack-ledger-anchor
uapi/app/api/btd/asset-pack-ledger-anchor/route.ts binds the Next.js App Router endpoint without a versioned route prefix
registry writes occur only when commitToRegistry is explicitly true

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.
Jest reports an existing ts-jest globals deprecation warning.

nonPromotionAssertions: BITCODE_SPEC.txt remained V26 until Gate 16 promotion
BITCODE_SPEC_V27_PROVEN.md did not exist until Gate 16 promotion
Gate 11 closure does not claim production broadcaster credentials, mainnet launch, generated V27 proof-family closure, or V27 promotion
All BTD API route paths remain unversioned
